purpose: High-signal upstream skill sources that should be checked for additions, removals, renamed skills, and material behavioral changes before broad discovery churn.

repositories.reason: Known high-signal personal skill repository already distilled in part; new or renamed skills should become explicit review candidates instead of being missed by broad keyword search.
watch_for: material behavior change that changes dependency, invocation, reusable asset, or safety boundary

registries.name: skills.sh
registries.reason: Large public registry of AI agent skills; should be sampled for new high-signal entries and registry/category changes, but not mirrored or copied.
watch_for: new high-adoption or high-relevance skill entries
